svg.title: Rental Research Agent Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram for an OpenClaw-based rental research agent, showing requirements, playbook, tools, skills, candidate queue, verification, worklog, and final shortlist.

path.aria-label: OpenClaw-based workflow for customized rental search, evidence verification, and auditable shortlist generation
criteria, chooses tools, records evidence, and stratifies results
stated fact · verified fact · inference · unknown / to confirm
Public repo focuses on architecture, methodology, and anonymized artifacts; core scrapers, prompts, and filtering implementation remain private.
